home.title: Welcome to CartaFlow
home.subtitle: Organize your thoughts, share knowledge, and collaborate seamlessly. Create beautiful card collections that inspire and engage.
home.emptyDescription: Create your first list to start collecting cards.
home.feature1Desc: Group your links and ideas into clean, tag-driven collections.
home.feature2Desc: Add rich Markdown notes, URLs and images to every card.
home.feature3Desc: Export your lists or share them with a single click.

signin.title: Welcome
signin.subtitle: Sign in to your CartaFlow account

noProviders.title: Configuration Required
noProviders.help: Please configure at least one provider in the environment variables.

lists.title: Lists
lists.description: Manage your personal lists and collections
lists.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this list?
lists.newListDescription: Create a new list to organize your content
lists.createListDescription: Give your list a name, an icon and some tags to get started.
lists.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your list and remove your data from our servers.

validation.serverError: An error occurred while creating the list. Please try again.

cards.title: Cards
cards.createCardDescription: Add a card with a title, description, URL and tags.
cards.editCardDescription: Update the details of this card.
cards.emptyDescription: Start building this collection by adding your first card.
cards.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove the card.

validation.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: Manage your connections across all your devices
sessions.securityMessage: If you see an unknown session, revoke it immediately and change your password.
sessions.revokeAllDescription: This will log you out of all other devices and browsers. Your current session will remain active.
sessions.tip1: Log out on public or shared devices
sessions.tip3: Use strong passwords and two-factor authentication
sessions.tip4: Keep your devices and browsers up to date
